titleStmt.title: SII 9.627: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 627. (A.R. No. 108 of 1927.) ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF CHANDESVARADEVA AT MALLIPALLI, KALYANADRUG TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Pushya, ba. 2, Budhavāra, Makara-Saṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1547 December 28, Wednesday, in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Yallapa of Kambhadūru and the son (name lost) of Murārirāvuta-Ayya made a grant of land for the service of the goddess Banada-Chavuṇḍēśvari at Maruḷanahaḷḷi, for the merit of Kṛishṇapa-Nāyaka, son of Bayapa-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu . svasti śrīja
yābhyudayaśālivāha
naśakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1469
neya plavaṁgasaṁvaca
rada puṣya ba 2 budhavāra
makarasaṁkrāṁti pu(ṁ)ṇya
kāladalū śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa sadāsivarāya
mahārāyara sāṁbrājyada
li maruḷanahaḷiya banada ca
vuṁḍēśvaridēvara divyaśrīpā
dapadmaṁgaḷige murārirāvu
taĀyanavara kumāra tiṁma
kaṁbhadūra yallapagaḷu
koṭa bhūdāna ma

karasaṁkrāṁti pu(ṁ)ṇyakā
ladali dēvara Amrutapaḍi
nayavēdya dīpārādhanegaḷu na
ḍeyabēku Eṁdu bayapanā
yakara kṛṣṇapanāyakaAyya
navarige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁ
du sahiraṁṇyōdaka da dā
na dānadhārapūrvakavāgi dhā
reneredu koṭevāgi �yo kāluve
ge Uṁṭāda gade geyiṁda baṁda
kōruguttageyallade phalabhōgava
nū cauṁḍēśvaridēvara Amru
tapaḍi nayivēdya dīpārādhanege
sallabēku Eṁdu samarpisideU
�yo dhāreneredu koṭatāḷikālu
vegade bhūdānake Ārobbaru A
ḷupidarū taṁma mātāpitṛga
ḷoḍane brāṁhmaranū vāraṇa
koṁda pā hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 9.627 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
